tagline: We see where help is needed and connect people instantly.
slogan_main: See it. Share it. Grow kindness.
slogan_connect: We see where help is needed and connect people instantly.
slogan_waste: Reduce food waste and help people.
slogan_community: Connect communities. Share what you have.
slogan_together: Together we can feed more, waste less.
slogan_coded_love: Coded with love for the whole Dogecoin community
slogan_since_2013: Helping others since 2013 — the Dogecoin way
slogan_jamaica: Dogecoin helped send Jamaica's bobsled team to Sochi 2014
slogan_akc: Kindness for every paw — like Dogecoin for the AKC Humane Fund
slogan_doge4water: Doge4Water & The Water Project — clean water, real impact
slogan_socks: Dogecoin socks for the homeless — warm feet, warm hearts
slogan_nascar: Kindness at full speed — Dogecoin sponsored Josh Wise at NASCAR 2014
slogan_small_coins: Small coins, huge hearts — much wow, very kindness
slogan_shibes: Shibes spread kindness around the world
my_listings_subtitle: Manage your places and available items on the map.
my_listings_empty: You have not shared anything on the map yet.
my_edit_subtitle: Update details, pickup window and contact info.
my_remove_confirm: Remove this listing from the map?
my_remove_confirm_desc: It will no longer be visible to others. You can post again anytime.
map_hint: tap the map to set your location
map_no_results: No resources found in this area.
auth_login_subtitle: Sign in to manage your listings on the map.
auth_register_subtitle: Create a free account to share or find help nearby.
password_forgot_hint: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
password_forgot_sent: If that email is registered, check your inbox for a reset link.
password_reset_desc: Choose a new password for your account.
password_reset_success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
password_reset_invalid_desc: Request a new reset link from the login page.
inquiry_hint: Include your name, email or phone so they can reply. No account needed.
inquiry_message_placeholder: Hi, I am interested in… Please include how to reach you.
inquiry_sent_copy: Message sent! A copy was emailed to you.
share_listing_hint: Each link opens this place on the map. Social previews use the listing photo when available.
share_unavailable: This listing cannot be shared yet
share_desc_giving: %s is sharing %s on DogeSeeds — find it on the map.
share_desc_needing: %s is looking for %s on DogeSeeds — find it on the map.
name: Name
donate_purpose: Donations keep the site running and support verified distribution operations. Not for personal profit.
post_subtitle: Individuals, farmers, fishermen, stores and groups can share food, clothes, toys and essentials for others to collect.
org_type_hint: Choose whether you share from home, from the land or sea, or represent a store or group.
share_description_hint: e.g. Kids clothes size 4-6, canned food, toys in good condition…
share_instructions_hint: Door buzzer, meet at entrance, call before visiting, parking notes…
pickup_hint: Set when people can collect your items. Your listing disappears after the end time.
pickup_invalid: Please set valid pickup start and end dates
pickup_end_before_start: Pickup end must be after pickup start
confirm_publish: Publish this listing on the map?
confirm_publish_desc: Your place will be visible to everyone during the pickup window you set.
confirm_reserve_desc: The organiser will be notified of your reservation.
confirm_logout_desc: You can sign back in anytime.
post_success: Your listing is live on the map!
register_success: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
cookie_notice: We use cookies and local storage to remember your language, onboarding choices and session. No tracking ads.
privacy_notice: Your account details are stored in this site's local database. Passwords are encrypted (hashed) in the database. We do not store sensitive data. Listings you publish are public on the map when you choose to share contact details.
privacy_consent: I understand and agree to how my data is stored
admin_subtitle: Manage site name, map, donations, language and email for the whole website.
admin_general_hint: Site identity and default language for new visitors.
admin_default_language_hint: Shown to visitors who have not chosen a language yet.
admin_map_hint: Starting map position when the site first loads.
admin_donate_hint: Wallet and transparency message on the donate panel.
admin_smtp_hint: Used for welcome emails, email confirmation links, and listing published notifications.
admin_site_url_hint: Used in email links. Leave blank to auto-detect.
admin_test_email_hint: Uses port 587 with TLS, or port 465 with SSL. Username is usually your full email address.
admin_test_sent: Test email sent to your admin address
email_verify_success_desc: Your account is verified. You can now use all features.
email_verify_failed_desc: This confirmation link is no longer valid. You can still use the site.
step1: People and places post what they can share
footer_mission: Reduce waste. Connect surplus with need.
contact_public_label: Show email & phone on the public map
contact_public_warning: If enabled, your contact details will be visible to everyone on the map.
select_offers_hint: Select food, clothing, toys or essentials you can share for others to collect
select_needs_hint: Select what you need from the community
location_photo_hint: Optional. Photo of items, storefront, or group logo. JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF, max 5 MB.
onboarding_subtitle: We connect people who need help with those who can share.
onboarding_seeker_desc: Find food, clothing, toys or essentials near you
onboarding_sharer_title: I want to share or connect
onboarding_sharer_desc: Share from home, as a farmer or fisherman, or as a store, scout group, volunteer team or NGO
onboarding_seeker_cats_hint: Select one or more. We'll filter the map for you
onboarding_seeker_done: You're all set! Explore the map to find help nearby.
onboarding_sharer_intent: What would you like to do?
onboarding_sharer_intent_hint: You can select both if it applies to you
onboarding_intent_offer_hint: Food, clothes, toys or essentials from home, or surplus from your organisation
onboarding_intent_need: We need support for our organisation
onboarding_intent_need_hint: Your group needs food, supplies or help to assist others in the community
onboarding_sharer_done: Ready to appear on the map?
onboarding_sharer_done_guest: Create a free account to add your place. Your choices will be pre-filled.
onboarding_sharer_done_user: Add your place now. We've pre-filled your choices.
onboarding_btn_post: Add my place on the map
onboarding_tip_nearby: Tap Near me to find resources around you
onboarding_tip_filters: Use filters for food, clothing, toys and essentials
onboarding_tip_list: Open List view to browse all nearby places
onboarding_select_category: Please select at least one category
onboarding_select_intent: Please select what you want to share or need
